name: Boating Simulator 2022
developer: Sebastian Mol, Yusuf Kenawy, Will Johnson, Kyle Norton, Arlen Barrett, Sam Carson, Martin Berman, Owen Griffiths, Euan Allison
short_description: If you thought the day would never come when a simulator game could make you want to go out and buy a boat, or better yet actually take up boating as a hobby, you were wrong. ~Joystick compatible~ *More Updates Regularly
detailed_description:
Are you ready to hit the water in this boating simulator? Boating Simulator 2022 is an engaging experience with intuitive controls(Joystick recommended). Float on the waves in this heavenly setting. Test your skills as you take on the different modes, including racing and rescuing, or just relax in your favourite seat and admire the scenery. The game's stunning visuals and attention to detail make this experience come to life like nothing else.

-Realistic Water Physics
-Multiple Boats
-Race Against AI
-Rescue People Lost At Sea
-Have Fun In Cannon Practice
-Learn To Berth Your Boat

*More Updates Regularly
